민수기 2:1.content: Yahweh spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying,

민수기 2:2.content: “The children of Israel shall encamp every man by his own standard, with the banners of their fathers’ houses. They shall encamp around the Tent of Meeting at a distance from it.”

민수기 2:3.content: Those who encamp on the east side toward the sunrise shall be of the standard of the camp of Judah, according to their divisions. The prince of the children of Judah shall be Nahshon the son of Amminadab.

민수기 2:4.content: His division, and those who were counted of them, were seventy-four thousand six hundred.

민수기 2:5.content: Those who encamp next to him shall be the tribe of Issachar. The prince of the children of Issachar shall be Nethanel the son of Zuar.

민수기 2:6.content: His division, and those who were counted of it, were fifty-four thousand four hundred.

민수기 2:7.content: The tribe of Zebulun: the prince of the children of Zebulun shall be Eliab the son of Helon.

민수기 2:8.content: His division, and those who were counted of it, were fifty-seven thousand four hundred.

민수기 2:9.content: All who were counted of the camp of Judah were one hundred eighty-six thousand four hundred, according to their divisions. They shall set out first.

민수기 2:10.content: “On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben according to their divisions. The prince of the children of Reuben shall be Elizur the son of Shedeur.

민수기 2:11.content: His division, and those who were counted of it, were forty-six thousand five hundred.

민수기 2:12.content: “Those who encamp next to him shall be the tribe of Simeon. The prince of the children of Simeon shall be Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.

민수기 2:13.content: His division, and those who were counted of them, were fifty-nine thousand three hundred.

민수기 2:14.content: “The tribe of Gad: the prince of the children of Gad shall be Eliasaph the son of Reuel.

민수기 2:15.content: His division, and those who were counted of them, were forty-five thousand six hundred fifty.

민수기 2:16.content: “All who were counted of the camp of Reuben were one hundred fifty-one thousand four hundred fifty, according to their armies. They shall set out second.

민수기 2:17.content: “Then the Tent of Meeting shall set out, with the camp of the Levites in the middle of the camps. As they encamp, so shall they set out, every man in his place, by their standards.

민수기 2:18.content: “On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim according to their divisions. The prince of the children of Ephraim shall be Elishama the son of Ammihud.

민수기 2:19.content: His division, and those who were counted of them, were forty thousand five hundred.

민수기 2:20.content: “Next to him shall be the tribe of Manasseh. The prince of the children of Manasseh shall be Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.

민수기 2:21.content: His division, and those who were counted of them, were thirty-two thousand two hundred.

민수기 2:22.content: “The tribe of Benjamin: the prince of the children of Benjamin shall be Abidan the son of Gideoni.

민수기 2:23.content: His army, and those who were counted of them, were thirty-five thousand four hundred.

민수기 2:24.content: “All who were counted of the camp of Ephraim were one hundred eight thousand one hundred, according to their divisions. They shall set out third.

민수기 2:25.content: “On the north side shall be the standard of the camp of Dan according to their divisions. The prince of the children of Dan shall be Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.

민수기 2:26.content: His division, and those who were counted of them, were sixty-two thousand seven hundred.

민수기 2:27.content: “Those who encamp next to him shall be the tribe of Asher. The prince of the children of Asher shall be Pagiel the son of Ochran.

민수기 2:28.content: His division, and those who were counted of them, were forty-one thousand and five hundred.

민수기 2:29.content: “The tribe of Naphtali: the prince of the children of Naphtali shall be Ahira the son of Enan.

민수기 2:30.content: His division, and those who were counted of them, were fifty-three thousand four hundred.

민수기 2:31.content: “All who were counted of the camp of Dan were one hundred fifty-seven thousand six hundred. They shall set out last by their standards.”

민수기 2:32.content: These are those who were counted of the children of Israel by their fathers’ houses. All who were counted of the camps according to their armies were six hundred three thousand five hundred fifty.

민수기 2:33.content: But the Levites were not counted among the children of Israel, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

민수기 2:34.content: Thus the children of Israel did. According to all that Yahweh commanded Moses, so they encamped by their standards, and so they set out, everyone by their families, according to their fathers’ houses.
